requirements.text: /init detects project name from git remote or directory name
requirements.acceptance: Run /init in a repo with origin remote; verify project.md title is replaced

requirements.text: /init detects language(s) from package manager config files
requirements.acceptance: Run /init in a repo with package.json; verify tech-stack.md shows TypeScript/Node.js
Run /init in a repo with pnpm-lock.yaml; verify tech-stack.md shows pnpm

requirements.text: /init replaces all <project-name> placeholders across 5 memory files

requirements.acceptance: grep '<TypeScript |' .omp/memory/project/conventions.md returns empty after /init in a TS project
grep '<TypeScript |' .omp/memory/project/tech-stack.md returns empty after /init in a TS project

requirements.text: Hydration is idempotent — re-running /init does not destroy filled-in fields
requirements.acceptance: Fill goal in project.md manually, re-run /init, verify goal is preserved

requirements.text: Undetected fields are explicitly marked, not left as template placeholders
requirements.acceptance: Undetected language rows show TODO marker or <unknown>, not the multi-choice placeholder

requirements.text: Human-only fields are left with TODO markers
requirements.acceptance: project.md has TODO markers for goal/success criteria/milestones, not raw template placeholders
All 12 gotcha rows in gotchas.md survive /init intact
All 5 decision rows in decisions.md survive /init intact

requirements.text: The hydration phase in init.md is clearly separated and documented
requirements.acceptance: init.md has a distinct Phase 2.5 section with explanation and bash/Python blocks

success_criteria: Fresh TypeScript clone: /init fills all auto-detectable fields, leaves human fields as TODOs
Fresh Rust clone: /init detects Rust/cargo correctly
Fresh Go clone: /init detects Go/go mod correctly
Docs-only repo: /init runs without errors, marks undetected fields explicitly
Template gotchas and decisions tables survive unmodified
No new dependencies, no standalone scripts, all logic inline in init.md
